title: Shine Demo Deck
description: A sample deck loaded dynamically at runtime.
author: Shine Team

steps.title: Fetch
steps.description: Deck config is fetched as JSON from an API endpoint or static file.

steps.title: Parse
steps.description: The JSON is validated and parsed into SlideConfig objects.

steps.title: Render
steps.description: The Shine runtime renders slides with full animation support.

items.title: Runtime Loading
items.description: No rebuild needed to show new decks

items.title: API or Static
items.description: Load from REST API or static JSON files

items.title: Validation
items.description: Deck configs are validated on load

items.title: Full Template Support
items.description: All 28 slide types work with JSON configs

items.title: Backward Compatible
items.description: Thin deck compile-time workflow still works

left.title: Before
left.body: Each deck required a separate build with Vite aliases.

right.title: After
right.body: A single runtime serves any number of decks dynamically.
